hero.title: Manage your freelance career <hl>from one platform</hl>.
hero.subtitle: Enter your profile once. Optimize it with AI for LinkedIn, Upwork, Fiverr, Bionluk and Armut; publish your portfolio in seconds.

features.title: Everything in one place.
features.subtitle: All the tools you need as a freelancer, connected and automated.

adapt.title: Platform adaptation
adapt.desc: Write your profile once. AI optimizes it separately for each platform — tone, language and expectations.

portfolio.title: Portfolio site
portfolio.desc: An SEO-friendly personal portfolio page published at /p/your-username. Ready for social sharing with OG tags.

matching.title: Job matching
matching.desc: Paste a listing; it compares against your profile, gives a 0–100 match score, and lists your strengths and gaps.

tracking.title: Application tracking
tracking.desc: Saved → Applied → Interview → Offer pipeline. Manage all your applications from one screen.

ai.title: AI generation
ai.desc: Powered by GPT-4o mini; structured output delivers the right format and platform-appropriate content every time.

secure.title: Secure & fast
secure.desc: Per-owner isolation with Supabase RLS. Pay-as-you-go model: only pay for what you use.

step1.title: Enter your profile
step1.desc: Fill in your headline, summary and skills once. This foundation is the source of everything.

step2.title: Pick a platform & adapt
step2.desc: Generate AI-optimized copy for LinkedIn, Upwork or other platforms.

step3.title: Share & track
step3.desc: Publish your portfolio, track your applications, match listings.

finalCta.title: Take your freelance career to the next level.
finalCta.subtitle: Free during beta. No credit card required.

mockup.scoreNote: Strong profile. Headline optimization is the biggest opportunity.
